name: Josera Fiesta-Plus 12.5kg
description: More variety with two-coloured Josera Fiesta-Plus kibble, plus a nutritional bonus. Vitamin-rich, red vitality booster chips, also contain taurine and L-carnitine, give your dog an extra dose of vigour. A well-balanced food with a balanced calcium phosphorus ratio, vitamin C, as well as manganese and copper, which are easy to absorb, support a strong bone structure and healthy joints. Additional amounts of important antioxidants such as vitamins E & C can protect cells against free radicals. L-carnitine and taurine in turn also support the dog’s heart function. Colourful kibble mix Vital booster chips for additional vigour: vitamins E & C protect cells against free radicals, taurine plus L-carnitine support the cardiac function. With tasty poultry and salmon With delicious powder sauce for added flavour Valuable fatty acids promote a healthy skin and shiny coat. A Complete food for adult dogs. Composition brown kibble (dried poultry protein; whole grain corn; rice; poultry fat; beet fibre; dried salmon protein 4.0 %; potato starch; hydrolysed poultry protein; hydrolysed vegetable protein; minerals; hydrolysed poultry liver; yeast; haemoglobin powder; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried protein from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus)); vitality booster chips 12.0 % (whole grain corn; poultry fat; maize protein; red beet powder; hydrolysed animal protein) FEEDING RECOMMENDATION weight inactive/older normal activity active 5 kg 45 g 60 g 75 g 10 kg 80 g 110 g 135 g 20 kg 135 g 180 g 230 g 30 kg 180 g 250 g 315 g 40 kg 225 g 310 g 390 g 60 kg 305 g 420 g 530 g 80 kg 380 g 520 g 655 g The recommended feed quantity is per animal per day based on target adult weight. Please note that the quantities stated are a guide only and must be adapted to your animal´s nutritional status and its activity. Please make sure your animal always has fresh water.
